title: sedum anglicum var. rivulare
intro: Sedum anglicum var. rivulare, also known as River Sedum, is a succulent plant species belonging to the genus Sedum. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Sedum anglicum var. rivulare can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its efficacy and safety in these forms have not been extensively studied.
